mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE del_flag = 0 ORDER BY sort, id
SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE del_flag = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort, id

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.del_flag = 0 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.sort, m.id

SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != ''
